club.courtHasActiveMatch: This court already has an active match
club.courtNotInClub: Court does not belong to this club
club.finishFeederNeedsWinner: This match feeds a winner into the next queued match, so you must pick a winner — "no result" isn't allowed here.
club.finishEmptySide: The side you picked as winner has no players yet (it's waiting on the previous match's winner) — this match can't be finished until its roster is filled.
club.cannotDeleteLastLevel: At least one skill level must remain — cannot delete the last one
club.matchCannotChangeCourt: Cannot change court for this match
club.matchNotFullToStart: Select all players before starting the match
club.matchCannotEditPlayers: Only pending matches can have their players edited
club.notEnoughPlayersDetail: Not enough players: need {needed}, available {available} (checked in {checkedIn} · playing/queued {playing})
club.cannotFormMatchSkillLock: Enough players, but no valid lineup (skill-gap limit or a locked pair is missing its partner)
club.noLineGroup: This club isn't linked to a LINE group yet — post the bind command in the group first
club.noPayable: No one has anything to pay right now
club.notEnoughPlayersForMatch: Not enough players for a match
club.payersNoLongerInClub: Selected payers are no longer in this club — please reselect
club.playerAlreadyLocked: Player is already in a locked pair
club.playerBusyInAnotherCourt: Player is already playing on another court
club.playerNotInClub: Player does not belong to this club
club.renameGuestOnly: Only guest players can be renamed
club.requireLineForClub: LINE login required to create a club
club.requireLineForPreset: LINE login required to use presets
club.requireLineForPresetCreate: LINE login required to create a preset
club.requireLineForPresetDelete: LINE login required to delete a preset
club.requireLineForPresetEdit: LINE login required to edit a preset
club.tooManySelected: Too many selected — pick at most {max}
club.selectUserFromSearch: Select a user from search results
club.bulkSessionNoFields: Select at least one field to update
club.invalidLevel: Selected level is not in this club's level set
club.bankReceiverIncomplete: Bank receiver on the receipt is incomplete (bank name and account number required) — fix it in Cost tab > Receipt settings
club.generateNotEnoughPlayers: Not enough eligible players to form a match
club.generateNothingToDo: Everyone already has their target matches — nothing new to generate
club.generateFailed: Failed to generate the queue — please try again
club.matchNeedsCourtToStart: Select a court before starting the match
club.matchWaitingForWinner: This match is waiting for a winner from an earlier match
club.matchNotInProgress: This match is no longer in progress
club.rebuildOnlyPending: Only pending matches can be re-rolled
club.rebuildNoPlayers: Not enough free players to re-roll this match
club.rebuildNoSwap: Everyone is already queued — no free player to swap in. Use Rebuild + reshuffle for the whole queue instead
club.rebuildSwapFailed: Couldn't re-roll right now — please try again
club.linkInvalidToken: The join link is invalid or has been revoked
club.linkRequestNotFound: Link request not found or already handled
club.linkAlreadyLinked: This LINE account is already linked to {name}
club.linkTargetNotGuest: This player is already linked to another account

tournament.requireLineLogin: LINE login required to create a tournament
tournament.thresholdChangeLocked: Cannot change division thresholds after matches have started — reset all matches to pending first
tournament.playerNotInTournament: Player does not belong to this tournament
tournament.noClassesForImport: No classes found — create a class in the settings tab before importing pairs
tournament.duplicatePlayerIds: Duplicate id_player in tournament (fix duplicates before importing pairs): {ids}
tournament.classNotFound: Class not found in this tournament
tournament.playersNotInTeam: Players do not belong to this team
tournament.playerAlreadyPaired: One or more players are already paired
tournament.selectFromSearch: Select a user from the search results
tournament.cannotAddSelf: You cannot add yourself as co-admin
tournament.cannotAddGuest: Cannot add a guest as co-admin
tournament.alreadyCoAdmin: This user is already a co-admin

class.codeDuplicate: Class code "{code}" already exists in this tournament
class.codeDuplicateGeneric: Class code already taken — choose a different code
class.deleteBlockedLiveMatches: Cannot delete — this class has completed or in-progress matches
class.upgradePairOnly: Only pair-based tournaments can be upgraded to competition mode
class.migrateFailed: Failed to migrate data into class — please try again
class.knockoutOnlyNoGroup: This class uses knockout_only format — no group stage
class.minTwoPairs: At least 2 pairs are required in this class
class.groupingFailed: Cannot form groups — check pair count
class.matchGenerateFailed: Cannot generate matches — check pair count per group
class.noGroupMatches: No group-stage matches yet — generate groups first
class.insufficientAdvancingPairs: Fewer than 2 pairs advanced from groups

match.alreadyCompleted: This match already has a score recorded — reset before editing
match.alreadyInProgress: This match is already in progress
match.checkinNoPlayers: Team has no players — add players before starting
match.checkinTbdSlots: Both sides must be assigned before starting — finish pairing first
match.courtConflictRetry: Court {court} was just taken — please try again
match.courtOccupied: Court {court} is in use by match #{n}
match.knockoutNoDrawAllowed: Draws are not allowed in knockout matches
match.manualMatchDisabledAfterBracket: Manual match creation is disabled after the bracket is generated
match.needTwoPairsPerDivision: Need at least 2 pairs per division
match.needTwoTeamsPerDivision: Need at least 2 teams per division
match.needTwoTeamsWithPairs: Need at least 2 teams that have pairs
match.noEnoughPairsInAnyDivision: Not enough pairs in any division
match.notCompleted: This match has no score yet
match.notEnoughPairsAdvanced: Not enough pairs advanced from groups
match.notInProgress: This match is not in progress
match.pairModeNoGroups: Pair mode does not use groups
match.pairNotInTournament: Pair does not belong to this tournament

match.reorderNonPendingFound: The order contains a match that is no longer pending
match.requireCourtBeforeStart: Select a court before starting the match

match.resolve_no_games: At least one game is required

match.uncheckedPlayers: {n} player(s) not checked in — open the team tab to check in

match.resolve_tied_game: Individual game scores cannot be tied
